keywords: timezone streak UTC offset local date user perspective boundary userTimezoneOffset
ironRules: userTimezoneOffset is a REQUIRED input field — never default to UTC
localDate = UTC timestamp + offset — computed at comparison time
Streak boundary = midnight in user's local timezone, not server UTC midnight
streakBonus passed to LedgerUpdater — not applied by StreakManager itself
Idempotency: (userId, localDate) — same local day does not re-increment
